verified_facts: Project is a landing page for Bridging Earth and Kanaria.
Primary paid CTA is the audiobook priced at $33.
The lead magnet should include at least one psychologically tuned, transformation-based front end.
A possible lead magnet is a quiz based on the Chapter 23 section 'Leadership Templates for the Now Age'.
The five named leadership templates are Anchor, Bridge, Weaver, Flamekeeper, and Mirror.
missing_important_inputs: Any existing brand assets or approved cover art
strategic_assumptions: The likely dream client includes spiritually literate seekers, regenerative builders, founders, facilitators, and pattern-recognizers.
A self-contained diagnostic quiz is the strongest static-friendly lead magnet for the first version.
GitHub Pages or other static hosting is the intended deployment path.
